title: Lathander
bodyText:
God of renewal, spring, dawn, vitality. Symbol: **a road traveling into the sunrise** (Eddy's "unfinished symbol" is a distorted version). "Old god of light," friendly with Gond.

> [!dm] The spine of the campaign:
> - Long ago Lathander came to Elor to purge a horror, loved the elf **Leliana** ("Lily" in old Elvish); their bloodline throws an **Aasimar** every few generations (white/grey eyes, wings later — gold-flecked blood) → the **Children of Lathandar**.
> - **Leliana fell into the pool.** Searching for her distracted him from the prophecy's horrors; he found her in a pool of water, entered — **trapped**. Their combined power kept their minds/memories/bodies from fully scattering.
> - Together they had just enough power to **send his body out**: that body is **Eddy**. The god wants his soul/body/mind reunited.
> - The red-haired cloaked healer in the shared dreams and the caged voice guiding Varen: **Leliana** is the strongest candidate (she was "a high-level cleric of another god").

# Freeing him = the Chapter-1 climax (grill 2026-07-09)
The win of Chapter 1 is **releasing Lathander from the Pool**, not destroying the Pool (which can't be killed). When he's freed:
- **The sun returns** — light comes back topside and the world begins to heal (literal "Rebirth").
- **[[eilistraee]] is restored** downstream, via the sun→moon link.
- The way up **opens/reveals itself**, and the party breaks topside — end of Chapter 1. See [[arc-chapter-1]].
